description: Transfer Stitch reference designs for Library / Knowledge / Sentence / Dictionary / Video surfaces into Flutter with content-correct, multilingual, light/dark-safe components.

tasks.title: Freeze Stitch design inventory and acceptance rules
tasks.notes: Captured current Stitch pages, accepted design direction, rejected navigation/color artifacts, content correctness rules, multilingual rules, light/dark token policy, route policy, component plan, and validation gates.

tasks.title: Define Library light/dark semantic token plan
tasks.notes: Defined Stitch color authority boundaries, recommended LibraryReferenceColors ThemeExtension, required surface/text/domain/interaction token families, initial palette direction, accessibility gates, and a Stitch prompt for palette exploration.

tasks.title: Audit current Flutter Library components against Stitch direction
tasks.notes: Mapped current Knowledge, Sentence, Dictionary, and Video components to real artifact fields and shared component boundaries. Confirmed the gap is presentation/component structure rather than data aggregate availability.

tasks.title: Implement shared Library reference tokens and base components
tasks.notes: In progress. Added LibraryReferenceColors ThemeExtension, registered light/dark tokens in AppTheme, and introduced shared stateless components: LibrarySectionCard, EvidenceChip, TargetTextBlock, LearnerTranslationBlock, TokenBreakdownTile, InlineExampleGroup, SemanticExampleTable, SourceMomentCard, RelatedKnowledgeCard, and DictionarySenseCard. KnowledgeModuleCard now delegates inline examples and semantic tables to shared components and uses LibraryReferenceColors instead of hardcoded Material colors. Remaining work: video-specific focus/transcript cards and final component naming cleanup.

tasks.title: Redesign Sentence Detail as sentence microscope
tasks.notes: Started early after core lrsut-03 shared components were available. SentenceDetailScreen now uses sentence microscope hero, target/learner blocks, evidence chips, token breakdown tiles, SourceMomentCard, RelatedKnowledgeCard, and topic/vocab evidence chips. It hides technical atom IDs/POS compositions from the primary UI. Remaining work: refine visual density and connect dictionary-specific sense cards where applicable.

tasks.title: Redesign Knowledge Detail with semantic examples and tables
tasks.notes: Reuse shared inline example and semantic table components; ensure explanation refs resolve, bottom examples are deduplicated, and table/example layout supports actual artifact fields rather than mockup-only rows.

tasks.title: Redesign Dictionary Entry Detail
tasks.notes: Implement learner-friendly homograph/sense display, examples, morphology, and related knowledge without raw resolver IDs or technical POS strings in primary UI.

tasks.title: Redesign Video Player learning overlay
tasks.notes: Apply current subtitle focus card, transcript, selected-token dictionary panel, and no duplicate dictionary popup rule.

tasks.title: Redesign Knowledge Index
tasks.notes: Apply index cards, filters, featured section, topic clusters, and evidence counts using artifact-backed data only.

tasks.title: Prepare canonical Library route migration brief
tasks.notes: Only after UI stabilizes, brief /library/knowledge, /library/sentences, /library/dictionary/entry, and /library/videos redirects.
